title: EGS-1.0.0-proposal.2 architecture — CFGCOMP hierarchy, IFACE layer, plane isolation, lifecycle aggregation
handoff_scope: Proposal.2 engine infrastructure cleared for synthetic-fixture implementation; F-450 edges REAL_DATA_PROMOTION_BLOCKED
reason: Prevent confusion between reference designs and physical vehicles, stop cross-configuration leaks, model physical interfaces explicitly, isolate physical/functional/procedural planes, and enforce deterministic evidence lifecycle before any procedure generation.
decision: Authorize EGS-1.0.0-proposal.2 as the active proposal schema/module under proposals/egs-v1/.
Do NOT mutate frozen EDTS Kernel schemas including schemas/assembly-relationship.schema.json.
Three-tier hierarchy: COMPDEF- (conceptual), CFGCOMP- (configuration reference), CMPINST- (VIN physical). Research/reference edges connect CFGCOMP-/IFACE-/OP- only.
Reject AID-*/ASSET-*/EDTS-COMP-* endpoints; reject CMPINST-* on CONFIGURATION_REFERENCE edges.
Exact-vehicle scope lock: CONFIGURATION_REFERENCE forbids model_year_range; cross-year similarity only via CROSS_CONFIGURATION_COMPARISON / SOURCE_APPLICABILITY_CANDIDATE with NOT_INHERITED.
Physical interface layer IFACE-CONNECTOR/GROMMET/MOUNT-HOLE/FLANGE/SERVICE-PORT as intermediate nodes.
Separate PHYSICAL / FUNCTIONAL / PROCEDURAL planes; forbid transient_state on permanent structural edges.
Flexible claims: structural classes require only relationship_existence; missing torque/fastener/pinout = knowledge gaps.
Deterministic edge_status aggregation from claim statuses (SOURCE_DISCOVERED…ASSERTION_VERIFIED); unread index ≠ verified.
Cycle engine reports HARD_CYCLE / CONDITIONAL_CYCLE / STATE_DEPENDENT_CYCLE / ALTERNATE_PATH_REQUIRED — never auto-resolve.
Admit REL-REG-01..06 sample edges as CANDIDATE_UNVERIFIED with PROCEDURE_GENERATION_NOT_AUTHORIZED / REAL_DATA_PROMOTION_BLOCKED.
Recommended decision EGS_V1_PROPOSAL_INFRASTRUCTURE_READY (synthetic fixtures cleared; real F-450 promotion blocked until WSM/EWD hashed+parsed).
missing_evidence: 2019 Super Duty Workshop Manual Section 501-14 PDF bytes (NOT_ACQUIRED)
